title: Query on table without rows and generated column results in "out of memory" error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c0 INT, c1 VARCHAR(255), c2 INT GENERATED ALWAYS AS (c0 + 1) STORED);
CREATE TABLE t3(c0 FLOAT, c1 INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0);
SELECT * FROM t2, t3 WHERE t2.c2 IS NULL AND t3.c1 = 0;
key_bug_features: Query on empty table with generated column causes memory error
